vendors.subtitle: Local Scratch Cooking
vendors.note: Prices will be posted at the festival.

menu.desc: 1/4# fresh beef n' bacon patty smashed to perfection n' served on a fresh brioche bun.
Always fresh n' always changing....Today's smashie features a 1/4# fresh beef n' bacon patty topped with melted brie cheese, marinated olives n' chili crunch. Grab yourself a napkin for this one!
Watch your drool for this one! This smashie is loaded with 2, 1/4lb beef n' bacon patties, American cheese, red onion n' Seth special sauce.
Slow-smoked chopped beef brisket, melty Mexican cheese, local poblano-cilantro cream, and enough pickled onion n' cabbage to keep things interesting.
Chopped pepperoni, mortadella, capicola, crisp lettuce, tomato, red onion, peperonata, pistachio, smoked mozzarella, n' tossed with italian mayo stacked so high you'll need to unhinge your jaw.
This is NOT your average wiener. It's made of ground burnt ends and seared to juicy perfection.

menu.item: The Top Shelf Burnt End Wiener
menu.desc: Stewed tomato jam topped with parmesan cream. You'll never think the same about your wien after biting into this bad boy!
Fried to golden perfection n' topped with Seth's pantry of seasonings.
Our mac n' cheese is ALWAYS made to order n' ALWAYS from scratch.
For our veggie lovin' friends - fresh zucchini - cucumber - horseradish salad. Who said veggies couldn't be fun?
Addie bakes from the heart n' from scratch. She donates $.50 from every cupcake sale to a local non-profit in our community! Today's flavor is Lemon-Raspberry.

Parker was diagnosed with Chronic Kidney Disease at 4 and had a kidney transplant at 6. She bakes these cookies from scratch and donates $.50 from each cookie to the National Kidney Registry. Today's flavor is Moster Cookie.
No one is sad it's rhubarb season! We pick this rhubarb fresh from our garden n' turn it into the perfect end of meal treat!
Crushed Oreo crust, homemade chocolate layer topped with creamy ice cream n' finished with more Oreos. Today's flavor is Chocolate Molten Ice Cream Cake.
Gluten free Oreos crushed n' folded with cream cheese, rolled into a ball, coated n' milk chocolate-butterscotch n' placed on a stick. Our girls' FAVORITE.

menu.item: Homemade Sour Cream Ice Cream n' Peach Compote
menu.desc: You haven't lived until you've tried our homemade sour cream ice cream. It only gets better when topped with slow roasted peach compote. Summer on a spoon!
